key_terms: Term: up to 20 years from opening (Traditional); standard 4% royalty; 5.2% minimum advertising; 1-mile Protected Area for free-standing; 10th anniversary refresh date

obligations: 5.2% minimum while AFA Rate Increase in effect (otherwise 4.2%)
Must participate in Local Cooperative Area Advertising per DMA
Cooperative governed by standard form bylaws
Costs of reduced-price/free food do not count
Remove all signs, menu boards, Arby's designs, trade dress
Make modifications to distinguish premises from Arby's system
Arby's may enter premises without trespass liability to make changes at franchisee expense
Arby's entitled to injunctive relief for any violation or threatened violation
Franchisee must reimburse Arby's costs including attorneys' fees
Arby's may cure franchisee's lease/sublease defaults at franchisee's expense
Arby's may take action if health/safety threat — including closing, removing products, entering premises
Franchisee solely responsible for all losses and expenses
Franchisee acknowledges significant risks; primary factor is own efforts
Officers/employees act in representative capacity only

terms: Georgia franchise law applies only if jurisdictional requirements met independently

clauses_walked.clause: Article 21:3 — Choice of Forum and Jury Waiver
terms: Franchisee must file in federal/state court closest to Arby's principal office
Arby's may also file where franchisee resides/does business

key_findings: Jury trial waiver is irrevocable and mutual — stated in all-caps
Arby's has broad self-help rights: can enter premises, cure defaults, remove products without trespass liability
Franchisee bears all costs of Arby's exercise of cure/health-safety rights
Acknowledgement provision attempts to disclaim all representations outside FDD
If no satisfactory amendment found, Arby's may terminate FA upon payment of franchise fee without interest/penalty
franchise_agreement.deferred_clauses: Full clause walk of Articles 1-9, 12-14, 16, 18-19 not completed — key terms covered via Item 17 chart

key_terms_from_item17: Terminates on death of individual developer

general_release.known_scope: Required for renewal and transfer per Item 17; state addenda in CA, HI, MD, MN limit scope to exclude state franchise law claims
